label: Substantival Participle (as Subject)
axis_inherited_from: cs371 (Participle root); morphology:1.0, syntax:0.8, clause:0.6 -- via the existing, unchanged ROOT_AXIS rule for the Participle root, not a new axis rule
rationale: Resolves the false negative from regression_test_report.tsv ("substantival participle as subject"): Wallace classifies participle function into three categories -- Adjectival, Substantival, Verbal -- but the Cheat Sheet source only carried Adjectival (cs372) and Verbal (cs377/cs391) into the ontology; Substantival was missing from the Participle subtree entirely. Added as a direct child of cs371, mirroring its existing siblings.
